title: Write ferrum_extlib_connect.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_connect: stream connection with happy eyeballs (RFC 8305), SO_ERROR validation, DANE enforcement, SRV+HTTPS/SVCB record integration, QUIC-aware API surface. Ferrum stdlib has basic TcpStream/connect but none of these correctness properties. Design extlib module: connection builder API, happy eyeballs IPv6-first+IPv4 stagger, DANE-authenticated connections, QUIC transport option.
